summary: Iteration 4: All 4 bug fixes tested and verified. 1) Dashboard 'Add New Client' button now navigates to /clients and auto-opens Add Client dialog. 2) All dates display in UK format dd/mm/yyyy across all pages. 3) Single advisor system - Kunal Kapadia hardcoded, no advisor dropdowns or filters anywhere. 4) Commission structure change - Proc Fee + Commission % with auto-calculation working. FIXED a critical runtime error in CaseDetail.js ('users is not defined').

feature_1_dashboard_add_client_button: Add New Client button visible on Dashboard
Add Client dialog auto-opens after navigation
feature_2_uk_date_format: Clients page Completion Date column shows dd/mm/yyyy (15/04/2026, 04/03/2026)
Case Detail Dates tab shows dd/mm/yyyy (15/04/2026, 15/04/2028, 03/03/2026)
Reports page tables show dd/mm/yyyy format (15/04/2026, 04/03/2026)
feature_3_single_advisor: Clients page - No Advisor column in table
Clients page - No Advisor filter in filters panel
Clients page - No Advisor field in Add Client dialog
Cases page - No Advisor column in table
Cases page - No Advisor filter in filters panel (only Status, Product Type, Commission Status)
Cases page - No Advisor field in Add Case dialog
Case Detail page - Shows 'Account Manager: Kunal Kapadia' (hardcoded)
feature_4_commission_structure: Add Case dialog - Has 'Proc Fee (£)' field with 'Amount from lender' placeholder
Add Case dialog - Has 'Your Commission %' field with 'e.g. 35' placeholder
Add Case dialog - Shows auto-calculated commission when both fields filled
Case Detail Commission tab - Shows 'Proc Fee (from lender)'
Case Detail Commission tab - Shows 'Your Commission Rate'
Case Detail Commission tab - Shows 'Your Commission' auto-calculated

bugs_fixed.issue: ReferenceError: users is not defined - caused page to crash
bugs_fixed.fix: Replaced Select dropdown for 'Assign To' in Add Task dialog with static Input showing 'Kunal Kapadia' (since it's a single-advisor system now)

seed_data_creation: Used existing test data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 bug fixes from iteration 4 are complete. Fixed a critical CaseDetail.js bug where 'users' was undefined (from removing multi-user support). The 'Assign To' field in Add Task dialog is now hardcoded to 'Kunal Kapadia'. All dates display in UK format dd/mm/yyyy. Commission structure uses proc_fee_total × commission_percentage / 100 for auto-calculation.

verification_summary.dashboard_add_client_button: PASS - Navigates to /clients and opens dialog
verification_summary.no_advisor_cases_filters: PASS - Only Status, Product Type, Commission Status
verification_summary.proc_fee_commission_structure: PASS - New fields in Add Case dialog
verification_summary.auto_calculated_commission: PASS - Shows in Add Case and Case Detail
